A2#5.notes: Extended _DEFAULT_DATE_METHODS to year (int32) / quarter (int8) / week_of_year (int8) / day_of_year (int16) / is_weekend (bool) on top of legacy day / weekday / month. New add_cyclical_date_features helper emits sin/cos pairs at hour / day / weekday / month / day_of_year periods (float32). create_date_features(..., add_cyclical=True) default. Mixed-tz WARN with concrete tz list (no auto-convert). 18 sensors green.

kaggle_research_sources: fastai add_datepart (de-facto tabular date FE reference)
NVIDIA blog: sin/cos vs RBF vs spline
